name: panic_retreat_and_block
description: Emergency survival action for low health: sprint directly away from the nearest hostile while facing/checking it, avoid allied players, place available blocks such as planks between the bot and hostiles when they are within 3 blocks, continue until at least 12 blocks of separation is reached or the short time limit expires, and do not stop to attack or eat during the retreat.
parameters: z.object({ preferredDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(64).default(12).describe("Stop retreating once the nearest hostile is at least this many blocks away"), retreatDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(64).default(12).describe("Distance in blocks to aim each retreat waypoint away from the nearest hostile"), maxDurationTicks: z.number().int().min(20).max(600).default(140).describe("Maximum active Minecraft ticks to spend retreating before stopping"), minimumHealth: z.number().min(0).max(20).default(1).describe("Abort if current bot health is below this value"), hostileSearchRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(4).max(96).default(32).describe("Radius in blocks for finding the nearest hostile to retreat from"), placeBlocksWhenWithinBlocks: z.number().min(0).max(8).default(3).describe("Try to place barrier blocks when a hostile is within this many blocks"), blockItemNames: z.array(z.string().min(1)).max(16).default(["oak_planks", "cobblestone", "dirt"]).describe("Inventory item names that may be equipped and placed as emergency barrier blocks, in priority order"), maxBlocksToPlace: z.number().int().min(0).max(16).default(6).describe("Maximum number of barrier blocks this retreat may place"), avoidPlayers: z.boolean().default(true).describe("Whether retreat waypoint selection should steer away from nearby allied player entities"), playerAvoidRadiusBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(16).default(4).describe("Radius in blocks around players to avoid while choosing retreat waypoints"), replanIntervalTicks: z.number().int().min(2).max(40).default(8).describe("Active Minecraft ticks between retreat waypoint recalculations") })
